source_path: 1. Contact360 user and billing and credit system/1.2 — Analytics Bedrock.json
title: Version 1.2 — Analytics Bedrock
summary: Structured delivery checklist (maps to Contract / Service / Surface / Data / Ops). **Docs paths** use `graphql.modules/` (not legacy `apis/`).
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["1.2.x Analytics Bedrock"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    usage["usage plus analytics queries"]
    usage --> dash["dashboard usage surfaces"]
    dash --> notify["low credit plus payment signals"]
    notify --> admin["admin stats plus adjustments"]
    admin --> limit["GraphQL rate limit middleware"]
    limit --> gate["1.2 release gate"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` P0-heavy **Service task slices** · `.3`–`.6` P1 / surface-data · `.7`–`.9` ops + minor freeze.
Theme: **Compass**.

Confirm analytics chart data endpoints are defined for dashboard visualization:
usage overview components use `usage` or `featureOverview` query.

Dashboard chart components render safely under auth:
No additional retention changes required; analytics queries respect user isolation.
Visual smoke: chart loads with throttling enabled (rate-limit layer does not break chart calls).
